name: RPlog_Leamer
title: Leamer the Guardian
summary: In the medsuite of the NRV Deliverance, Jessalyn Valios keeps a tender vigil over the recovering Roark, their quiet, intimate conversation interrupted by the arrival of the towering Horansi officer Captain Leamer, who claims to be a 'Guardian' watching over important guests. Leamer's condescending, domineering manner toward Jessalyn and the young Horansi corporal Kuxli sparks a fierce confrontation in the crew lounge, where Leamer invokes Horansi caste hierarchy and military protocol to berate and command Kuxli, ordering him confined to quarters while Jessalyn furiously defends her friend. After Leamer departs and Jessalyn vows he will answer to his commanding officer, she retreats with Kuxli to the crew quarters, where their bond is reaffirmed -- Kuxli returning a pendant she once gave him, and Jessalyn quietly confiding the loss of the baby she was carrying before the two part for the night on warm terms.
